title: malcolmia patula subsp. broussonetii
intro: Malcolmia patula subsp. broussonetii, also known as Broussonetia, is a plant species within the family Capparaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Malcolmia patula subsp. broussonetii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
